items.title: Bipartisan talks to end Homeland Security standoff get serious as shutdown drags on

items.title: Column: Jensen Huang doesn’t need a new chip. He needs a new moat.

items.title: Trump's mediators offer Hamas formal proposal to give up its weapons in Gaza

items.title: The Iran war is metastasizing. Trump needs an endgame.
